result.preview: "Execution successful. Output:\n[{'name': 'Encino Dermatology & Laser: Alex Khadavi MD', 'high_rating_reviews': 19}, {'name': 'The Boochyard @ Local Roots', 'high_rating_reviews': 17}, {'name': 'Aurora Massage', 'high_rating_reviews': 14}]"

args.code:
import pandas as pd

reviews = pd.DataFrame(env['data_2'])
businesses = pd.DataFrame(env['data_3'])

merged = pd.merge(reviews, businesses, on='gmap_id')
merged = merged.sort_values('high_rating_reviews', ascending=False).head(3)

print(merged[['name', 'high_rating_reviews']].to_dict('records'))
